hooks.command: bash -c 'FILE="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH"; if [[ "$FILE" == *.py ]]; then ruff format "$FILE" 2>/dev/null && ruff check --fix --quiet "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; fi'

bash -c 'FILE="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH"; if [[ "$FILE" == *.ts || "$FILE" == *.tsx || "$FILE" == *.vue || "$FILE" == *.js || "$FILE" == *.jsx || "$FILE" == *.css || "$FILE" == *.json ]]; then npx prettier --write "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true; fi'

bash -c 'FILE="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH"; if [[ "$FILE" == *.ts || "$FILE" == *.vue || "$FILE" == *.js || "$FILE" == *.jsx || "$FILE" == *.tsx ]]; then grep -n "console\.log" "$FILE" 2>/dev/null && echo "⚠️  [Hook] console.log detected in $FILE — remove before commit" >&2; fi; exit 0'

PostToolUse.description: Warn about console.log in JS/TS/Vue files

hooks.command: bash -c 'CMD="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_COMMAND"; if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE "(git push|docker push)"; then echo "[Hook] Push detected — have you run /quality-gate?" >&2; fi; if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE "(rm -rf|DROP TABLE|truncate)"; then echo "[Hook] DESTRUCTIVE COMMAND detected: $CMD" >&2; fi; exit 0'

PreToolUse.description: Remind to run quality checks before push
